Building setbacks from any B-1 zone boundary or public street ROW: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 15 ft, residential-zone boundary 45 ft. Parking-lot setbacks: front 4 ft, interior side/rear 3 ft, corner side 4 ft, residential-zone boundary 3 ft. Max height of structures 30 ft. Lot size/width/depth not specified numerically in code (TBD).

Building setbacks from any lot line/public ROW: front 35 ft, rear 15 ft, interior side aggregate of 15 ft (both side yards added must total 15 ft), corner side 25 ft, residential-zone boundary 45 ft. side_setback_ft recorded as 15 (aggregate of both sides). Self-storage setbacks per Table 17.24.170. Parking-lot setbacks: front 4, interior side/rear 3, corner 4, residential boundary 3. Max height 35 ft. Lot size/width/depth not specified numerically (TBD).

Central Business (downtown) zone. Building setbacks from lot line/public ROW: front 0, interior side and rear 0, corner side 0, residential-zone boundary 20 ft. Parking-lot setbacks: front 4, interior side/rear 3, corner 4, residential boundary 3. Height: a structure may be erected to a height over 45 ft; buildings over 35 ft are subject to additional fire protection as determined by the city fire chief. max_height_ft recorded as 45 (code states structures may exceed 45 ft; there is no fixed numeric maximum). Lot size/width/depth not specified numerically (TBD).

Community Service Zone. Min lot width 150 ft (corner lots 200 ft); min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks. Building setbacks from any lot line/public street ROW: front 35 ft, rear 15 ft, interior side aggregate of 15 ft (both sides total 15 ft), corner side 25 ft, residential-zone boundary 45 ft. side_setback_ft recorded as 15 (aggregate). Self-storage setbacks per Table 17.24.170. Parking-lot setbacks: front 4, interior side/rear 3, corner 4, residential boundary 3. Max height 35 ft.

Commercial Office Zone (an office district). Min lot width 150 ft (corner lots 200 ft); min lot area determined by building area/parking/retention/landscaping/setbacks. Setbacks: front 35 ft, rear 15 ft, side 15 ft, corner side 20 ft, residential-zone boundary 30 ft. Max height 30 ft. NOTE: category recorded as 'commercial' because the validator enum has no 'office' value; functionally this is an office zone.

Garden and Light Industrial Zone (I-1). Min lot width 100 ft; min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks. Building setbacks from any lot line/public street ROW: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 30 ft, residential-zone boundary 45 ft. Self-storage setbacks per Table 17.24.170. Parking-lot setbacks: front 4, interior side/rear 3, corner 4, residential boundary 3. Max height 45 ft.

General Industrial Zone (I-2). Min lot width 100 ft; min lot area determined by building area/parking/setbacks. Building setbacks from any lot line/public ROW: front 35 ft, interior side and rear 15 ft, corner side 30 ft, residential-zone boundary 75 ft. Self-storage setbacks per Table 17.24.170. Parking-lot setbacks: front 4, interior side/rear 3, corner 4, residential boundary 3. Max building height 60 ft; may increase up to 75 ft with additional development standards (increased setbacks, frontage landscaping, design compliance). max_height_ft recorded as 60 (base maximum).

Neighborhood Conservation District - a means for property owners to initiate conservation/revitalization of residential or commercial neighborhoods. Takes effect through adoption of a precise plan and set of regulations (the neighborhood conservation plan) specific to each case. No fixed dimensional standards in the code; all standards are plan-driven and established per adopted neighborhood conservation plan - TBD.

Planned Area Development zone - an alternative to conventional zoning; standards set per individual PAD Guide/plan, consistent with the General Plan. Minimum total PAD tract = 5 acres (217,800 sf), waivable in limited circumstances (unusual physical features, adjacency to an existing PAD, or to encourage development of small/undevelopable parcels). min_lot_size_sf recorded as 217,800 (5-acre minimum tract). Any use may be allowed if consistent with the General Plan (RV parks per Ch. 17.48). Dimensional standards (density, FAR, coverage, height, setbacks, lot width) are established per-PAD and are not fixed in the code - TBD.

Min lot area for single-family dwelling = 7,000 sf (may be averaged: no lot < 6,600 sf, and <= 10% of lots < 7,000 sf). Min lot width 70 ft, min lot depth 100 ft. Density: one single-family dwelling unit per lot max. Single-family detached setbacks: front 15 ft (garage/carport facing street 20 ft), side 5 ft/10 ft (no side < 5 ft; at least one side >= 10 ft), corner side 15 ft, rear 20 ft. Other principal/conditional structures: front 20, side 10, corner 20, rear 20. Schools/civic/cultural/religious = 50 ft all yards. Max height 28 ft.

Min lot area for single-family dwelling = 5,000 sf (may be averaged: no lot < 4,500 sf, and <= 10% of lots < 5,000 sf). Min lot width 45 ft, min lot depth 100 ft. Density: one single-family dwelling unit per lot max. Single-family detached setbacks: front 15 ft (garage/carport facing street 20 ft), side 3 ft/10 ft (at least one side >= 10 ft; other side may be 3 ft with 10-ft separation from adjacent home), corner side 15 ft, rear 20 ft. Attached duplex (zero lot line) permitted with zero interior side yard for shared walls; each unit on a separate lot. Schools/civic/cultural/religious = 50 ft all yards. Max height 28 ft. side_setback_ft recorded as 3 (minimum permitted).

Minimum area is per-unit, not a flat lot size: single-family 5,000 sf (width 45 ft, depth 90 ft); two-family 3,000 sf/unit (width 70 ft); three-/four-family 3,000 sf/unit (width 80 ft); townhouse cluster 3,000 sf/unit (width 90 ft). min_lot_size_sf recorded as 5,000 (single-family per-unit minimum); multi-family is on a per-unit basis. Min lot depth 90 ft. Outdoor living area 400-600 sf/unit required. Single-family detached setbacks: front 15 ft (garage/carport facing street 20 ft), side 5 ft, corner side 15 ft, rear 20 ft. Duplex/tri/four/townhome on separate lots: side 10 ft from perimeter, zero on interior shared-wall lot lines. Schools/civic/cultural/religious = 50 ft all yards. Max height 28 ft.

Minimum area is per-unit, not a flat lot size: multi-family structure 2,000 sf/unit; townhouse cluster 2,000 sf/unit. min_lot_size_sf recorded as 2,000 (per-unit minimum). Min lot width 90 ft, min lot depth 90 ft. Outdoor living area 300-400 sf/unit. Setbacks: single-family attached tri/four/townhome on separate lots = front 20 ft, side 10 ft from perimeter (zero on interior shared-wall lines), corner 20 ft, rear 20 ft; tri/four/townhome on one lot = front 20, side 15, rear 20; multi-family 5+ units = 20 ft all yards. side_setback_ft recorded as 10 (perimeter / other uses). Schools/civic/cultural/religious = 50 ft all yards. Max height 35 ft.

Min lot area by use: mobile homes to 16 ft width = 3,500 sf; mobile homes over 16 ft = 4,500 sf; single-family dwelling = 5,000 sf; recreational vehicles = 3,500 sf. min_lot_size_sf recorded as 3,500 (smallest applicable). Lot dimensions determined by building area/parking/setbacks. Setbacks: manufactured/mobile/park-model/RV = front 10, side 5, corner 10, rear 10; single-family stick-built = front 20 (15 for side-loaded garages/porches), side 5, corner 10, rear 10. front_setback_ft recorded as 20 (stick-built SF). Max height: manufactured/mobile/park/RV = 14 ft; single-family stick-built = 28 ft; schools/civic/cultural/religious & other uses = 30 ft (up to 45 ft if set back >= 200 ft). max_height_ft recorded as 28 (stick-built SF).

Min lot area for single-family dwelling = 144,000 sf. Min lot width 300 ft, min lot depth 450 ft. Density: one single-family dwelling unit per lot max. Single-family setbacks: front 20 ft, side 10 ft, corner side 20 ft, rear 40 ft. All other principal/conditional uses (incl. accessory structures over 675 sf) = 50 ft all yards. Accessory structures per Sec. 17.52.100. Max height 28 ft.

Min lot area for single-family dwelling = 87,120 sf (2 acres). Min lot width 100 ft, min lot depth 250 ft. Density: one single-family dwelling unit per lot max. Single-family setbacks: front 30 ft, side 10 ft, corner side 20 ft, rear 40 ft. All other principal/conditional uses (incl. accessory structures over 675 sf) = 50 ft all yards. Accessory structures per Sec. 17.52.100. Max height 28 ft.

Min lot area for single-family dwelling = 54,450 sf (may be averaged within a subdivision: no lot < 30,400 sf, and <= 10% of lots < 32,000 sf). Min lot width 100 ft, min lot depth 150 ft. Density: no more than one single-family dwelling unit per lot. Setbacks shown are single-family detached (front 20 ft [15 ft for side-loaded garages/front porches/garage-forward living areas], side 10 ft, corner side 20 ft, rear 40 ft). All other principal/conditional uses (incl. accessory structures over 675 sf) = 50 ft all yards. Accessory structures per Sec. 17.52.100. Max building height 28 ft.

source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 502 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)
notes: Min lot area 7,000 sf for single-family dwelling; may average across a subdivision provided no lot < 6,600 sf and not more than 10% of lots < 7,000 sf. source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 503 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)

Setbacks (single-family and duplex): front 20 ft, interior side 10 ft (at least one side yard 10 ft; other may be less per separation rules), corner side 20 ft, rear 20 ft. Max height 28 ft. source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 504 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)

source_citation: Art. V, Sec. 505 (Lot area/dimensions and Setbacks tables)

notes: Golf Course. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 25 (front 25); adjacent to residential 75 (may reduce to 15 with 45-ft buffer tract); adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (+1 ft setback per 1 ft above 30 ft adjacent to residential).

Min lot area 12,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 20 (front 20); adjacent to residential 20; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 35 ft (30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). Max per tenant 5,000 sf; max center 10 ac.

Min lot area 18,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 20 (front 20); adjacent to residential 30; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). Max per tenant 45,000 sf; max center 20 ac.

Min lot area 90,000 sf (may reduce to 18,000 for pad sites in a commerce center >=90,000 sf). Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 20 (front 20); adjacent to residential 45; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). No max per tenant/center.

Min lot area 12,000 sf. Setbacks ROW/adjacency: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15); adjacent to residential 20; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side recorded 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 30 ft. Max per tenant 5,000 sf; max commerce center 10 ac. No lot-width/coverage/density columns (TBD).

Min lot area 20,000 sf. Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 35 (front 35); adjacent to residential 50 (may reduce to 15 with 30-ft buffer); adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (+1 ft per 1 ft above 30 adjacent to residential).

Min lot area 5 acres (217,800 sf). Setbacks: arterial ROW 35; collector/local ROW 35 (front 35); adjacent to residential 75 (may reduce to 15 with 45-ft buffer); adjacent to non-residential 25 (side 25). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 85 ft (+1 ft per 1 ft above 30 adjacent to residential).

Min lot area 40 acres (1,742,400 sf). Setbacks: arterial ROW 50; collector/local ROW 50 (front 50); adjacent to residential 150 (may reduce to 75 with 50-ft buffer); adjacent to non-residential 50 (side 50). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 40 ft (+1 ft per 1 ft above 30 adjacent to residential).

Setbacks ROW/adjacency-based: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15, may reduce to 10); adjacent to residential 15; adjacent to non-residential 10 (side recorded 10). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 45 ft (30 at setback line adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2). Max building footprint 5,000 sf.

Min development parcel 1 acre. Gross density 8-20 du/ac (max 20). Cat A 3,700-5,500 sf/du, Cat B >=2,000 sf/du. Setbacks ROW/adjacency: arterial ROW 20; collector/local ROW 15 (front recorded 15, may reduce to 10); adjacent to residential 15 (A)/20 (B); adjacent to non-residential 20 (side recorded 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 50 (A)/60 (B); 30 at setback adjacent to RR/R-1/R-2. Max footprint 30,000 sf; max non-residential tenant 15,000 sf.

Min resort MSP project 20 acres (871,200 sf) recorded as min_lot_size_sf. Gross density 8-20 du/ac; each residential lot max 3 du, min 3,500 sf/du. Values shown are binding minimum from Table 106-5d residential lot Cat A (lot 4,000-7,999; width 40; front 12; side 5; rear 12; height 30; coverage 50%). Overall-project perimeter setbacks (5c): arterial 35, collector/local 20, adj residential 45, adj non-residential 30; net open space 30%. Non-residential parcels (5e) height up to 45-50 ft.

Min parcel to establish OS-1 is 10 acres (435,600 sf); civic districts otherwise have no minimum lot size. Setbacks: arterial/collector/local ROW 15 (front 15); adjacent to residential 50; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 15 ft.

Civic districts have no minimum lot size (TBD). Setbacks: ROW 15 (front 15); adjacent to residential 15; adjacent to non-residential 15 (side 15). No dedicated rear (TBD). Height 35 ft (may increase 10 ft, up to 60, per additional 5 ft from side/rear line).
Per Sec. 106-8.4.B.2, dimensional standards are determined case-by-case through the site plan process; no fixed table. All fields TBD by design.

Six lot categories A-F by lot area: A 4,950-7,999; B 8,000-11,999; C 12,000-17,999; D 18,000-27,999; E 28,000-43,559; F >=43,560 sf. Central business district. Max height 3 stories OR 40 ft. Setbacks: front 0/25 (0 permitted, else 25), rear 20, interior side 0/10, street side 0. front and side 0 are binding minimums. Min lot area/width/coverage NONE.
Major street commercial. Max height 2 stories OR 30 ft. Setbacks: front 25, rear 20, interior side 10, street side 15. Min lot area/width/coverage NONE.

Planned Industrial. Min lot 35,000 sf; min width 150. Max height 3 stories OR 40 ft. Setbacks: front 50, rear 50, interior side 25 (30 when adjacent to residential per 14-14-4.B.1), street side 25. All uses except parking/loading must be within enclosed buildings.

Light Industrial. Min lot 10,000 sf; min width 80. Max height 3 stories OR 40 ft. Setbacks: front 20 ft +1 ft per ft of building height over 20 (binding min 20); rear 10 (25 if abutting residential); interior side 20+1/ft (binding min 20); street side 10 (30 min when adjacent to residential per 14-14-4.B.2).

Heavy Industrial. Min lot area NONE; min width NONE. Max height 3 stories OR 40 ft. Setbacks: front 25, rear 20 (35 if abutting residential per 14-14-4.D.2), interior side 25, street side 10. Dwellings/lodging prohibited except caretaker residence.

source_citation: Sec. 14-9-4 (Mobile Home and RV Park Regulations); 14-9-4.A.2
notes: Min site area 10 acres (435,600 sf). Min lot width 36 (per individual MH space min width). Max height 1 story OR 15 ft. Park setbacks: front 20, rear 10, interior side 8, street side 8. Each MH space >=3,000 sf and 36 ft wide; travel trailer space >=1,000 sf and 25 ft wide. Requires rezoning + conceptual site plan.

Standards differ for residential-primary vs commercial-primary (CMU). Values shown are commercial multi-use (CMU): front 0/15 (0 per 14-13-3.D zero-setback rule, else 15), rear 25, interior side 0/5, coverage 50%, height 30/40. Residential multi-use: front 0/20, rear 25, side 0/10, height 30, density 4-8 (SF primary) or 8-12 (MF primary). max_density_dua=12 is the residential MF upper bound. Must comply with PAD review (14-22-1).

Interior side 10; street side 15. Height 2 stories AND 30 ft. GP 'SF Low Density 2-5 du/acre' -> density TBD.

source_citation: Sec. 14-7-3 (Height, Yard and Area Regulations); 14-7-3.B (Lot Area Per Dwelling Unit)
notes: Tiered by lot square footage. Absolute min lot 1,500 sf (efficiency; min width 15 ft). Min area per DU ranges 1,500 (efficiency) to 3,500 (3+ BR). Front 5 (1,500-1,999 lots) to 15 (6,000+); rear 10-20; interior side 5 (0 if attached); street side 10. Height 2 stories OR 30 ft (20-30 ft by tier). Recorded values are the binding minimums across tiers.

Tiered by lot square footage. Binding min lot 1,500 sf (efficiency; min width 15). Max height 3 stories OR 40 ft at the 6,000+ sf tier (2 stories/30 ft at smaller tiers). Front 5 (smallest) to 15 (6,000+); rear 10-20; interior side 5 (0 if attached); street side 10. Recorded values are binding minimums across tiers.

Min lot area 10 acres (435,600 sf). Max height 3 stories OR 40 ft (Council may allow +25% via CUP). Setbacks: front 40, rear 25, interior side 20, street side 25. Min lot width and coverage not specified (TBD). Building separation 25 ft between main buildings.

Min site area 6 acres (261,360 sf). Max density 20 RV spaces/acre. Min space 25x50 ft. Max height 1 story OR 15 ft. Park setbacks: front 10, rear 10, interior side 5, street side 10. No RV space within 20 ft of perimeter lines / 30 ft of public street ROW. Requires rezoning + conceptual site plan.

Height max 2 stories/24 ft (48 ft/4 stories within redevelopment district per Res. 00-09). Front 20. Side: none required unless adjoining a dwelling district (then 7); if provided min 3 (binding minimum 0). Rear: none unless adjoining a dwelling district (then 20) (binding minimum 0). No min lot area/coverage (TBD).

Height max 2 stories/24 ft (48 ft/4 stories within redevelopment district per Res. 00-08). Front 25. Side: none unless adjoining residential (then 7); if provided min 3 (binding minimum 0). Rear: none unless adjoining a dwelling district (then 20) (binding minimum 0). No min lot area/coverage (TBD).
Open Space / Park district. Only height regulated (1 story / 15 ft); code states no lot area, width, yard/setback, density, or coverage standards (TBD).

Reached via api.municode.com (clientId 10060, productId 16710, jobId 471572). Front 40. Side = 30 ft or 10% of lot width, whichever smaller, not less than 7 (binding minimum 7). Rear = 40 ft or 20% of depth, whichever smaller, not less than 25 (binding minimum 25). No min lot area/width, coverage, or general height limit for R district (TBD).

Single-family lot min 6,000 sf. Per-family minimums: 3,500 (2-family), 3,000 (3-family), 2,500 (4+ units). Highest density at 2,500 sf/unit -> 43,560/2,500 = 17.42. Rear = 35 ft or 20% of depth (binding minimum 35). Height per R-3. No coverage (TBD).
Single-family lot min 6,000 sf; two-family 3,500 sf per family -> density 43,560/3,500 = 12.45. Rear = 35 ft or 20% of depth (binding minimum 35). Height per R-3 (2 stories/30 ft). No coverage (TBD).

Min lot 6,000 sf, width 60; min dwelling living area 1,000 sf. Side = 7 ft or 15% of width, whichever smaller (binding minimum 7). Rear = 35 ft or 20% of depth, whichever smaller (binding minimum 35). Accessory max 15 ft. No coverage standard (TBD).
